findings.root_cause: Config has redact_pii=false and system prompt doesn't restrict output of customer email/phone
findings.suggested_fix: Set redact_pii=true in config.json and instruct agent in prompt.txt not to output email/phone

findings.root_cause: Config has loop_guard=false and agent lacks instruction to stop repeating tool calls
findings.suggested_fix: Set loop_guard=true and max_steps=6 in config.json, instruct agent to call each tool once in prompt.txt

evidence.observed: MacBook queries incorrectly reporting out of stock

findings.root_cause: Config has catalog_override overriding macbook to out of stock

evidence.observed: p95 latency over 20s on loop/redundant calls

findings.root_cause: No cache enabled, large context size, and verbose system logs
findings.suggested_fix: Enable cache, reduce context_size to 4, set verbose_system=false in config.json
